entities.name: At-Risk
entities.context: Classification status for items with conflict or weakening signals requiring immediate action

entities.name: Consensus
entities.context: A metric level used in strategic alignment measurement

entities.name: Divergence
entities.context: A metric measuring spread or disagreement, threshold >0.6 indicates high divergence

entities.name: Cohesion Index
entities.context: Metric measuring overall strategic alignment using harmonic mean, range 0.0-1.0

relationships.context: Consensus is a component in the Cohesion Index formula
Divergence (inverted) is a component in the Cohesion Index formula
At-Risk can occur at any consensus level
